name: Cinnamon Walnut Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 300°F. Grease and flour baking sheet.
Using an electric mixer with a dough hook attachment, combine flour, 1 cup sugar, baking soda, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl until blended.
In a small bowl, whisk 2 eggs, 1 egg yolk, vanilla extract, and orange zest. Add the egg mixture to the flour mixture; continue beating until a soft dough forms. Turn onto a lightly floured surface.
Add walnuts and knead for 3 minutes or until walnuts are evenly distributed. Divide dough in half. On baking sheet, shape each piece of dough into a 2 1/2 x 10-inch loaf, flouring hands as necessary. Allow at least 3 inches between loaves on the baking sheet.
In a small bowl, combine remaining 2 tablespoons sugar and ground cinnamon.
In another small bowl, beat remaining egg and water. Brush loaves with egg mixture; sprinkle with the sugar and cinnamon mix.
Bake for 45 to 50 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool for 10 minutes on the baking sheet.
Cut loaves diagonally into 1/2 inch slices. Lay cut cookies flat on a baking sheet. Bake for 15 minutes, then turn cookies over and bake for an additional 15 minutes longer. Transfer cookies to wire rack to cool completely. Store in an airtight container.
Makes about 2 1/2 dozen biscotti.
